citation: Law on Advertising No. 16/2012/QH13 — Article 5 (Language of advertisements)
summary: Advertisements distributed in Vietnam must use Vietnamese for mandatory consumer-facing information, warnings, and material terms unless a lawful exception applies.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: English-only or mixed-language consumer warnings, instructions, or material terms in VN-targeted ads. ACTION: WARN — require Vietnamese localisation for mandatory elements. CHECK: Warnings, usage instructions, pricing terms, and disclosures. ESCALATE IF: Safety or health warnings absent in Vietnamese.
